B2B & HR

A team-building venue near Almaty

Seminar halls, catering, professional sound and outdoor activities — for teams from 10 to 200+ people.

What we provide

Seminar halls

Equipped spaces for conferences and strategy sessions.

Catering

Banquet and buffet menus tailored to your event format.

Sound & lighting

Professional technical equipment for presentations and ceremonies.

Outdoor activities

Team-building programs run by certified instructors.

Group accommodation

Simultaneous housing for large teams across chalets and cottages.

Transfer

Organized transport for groups to and from Almaty.

PDF presentation for HR and office managersFormats, venues and prices for corporate events — in a single file.
Download PDF proposal

We work under contract

Contract & invoice

Full legal support for the deal.

VAT and non-VAT billing

Payment forms that match your company's accounting policy.

Certified instructors

Activity safety confirmed by accreditation.

Bank transfer & prepayment

Flexible settlement terms for legal entities.

Corporate event request

Fill out the form — our corporate events manager will reach out on WhatsApp.

Your request is ready — send the message in the WhatsApp window that just opened.
Planning an event?Let's discuss the format, dates and budget.

Tau-Turan Resort

Tau-Turan Resort is a year-round mountain recreation area in the foothills of Almaty: family getaways, corporate events, team-building and celebrations.
